description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:18-buster Docker image and caches the node_modules/ and .yarn directories. Define two stages, test and deploy, and set a global before_script that configures Yarn to use .yarn as the cache folder and installs dependencies with yarn install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline. In the test stage add a lint job that runs yarn run lint, a tests job that runs make test, and a typescript job that runs yarn run tsc --noEmit. In the deploy stage add a pages job that, before its script, runs the same Yarn setup plus apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y hugo python3 python3-toml python3-yaml, then executes make -C website build, make apply-latest-basename, make build, removes the existing public directory, moves website/public to public and moves the build output to public/releases/latest, and finally publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact. The pages job only runs on the main branch.
